name: SG 553 | 旅行者皮革
descriptionEn: The terrorist-exclusive SG553 is a premium scoped alternative to the AK47 for effective long-range engagement. It has been custom painted in a stripe design inspired by vintage luggage, and had some parts wrapped in brown leather. Everyone has a story, and Javier will pry it out before he kills you
descriptionZh: T专用的 SG553 是一把适用于远距离交战的 AK47 替代品。 受老式行李的启发，这把武器使用条纹设计图案进行了自定义涂装，部分零件用棕色皮革包裹。 每个人都有着自己的故事，哈维则会在他杀掉你之前倾诉而出
